title: Storyboard Sheet 15S Comedic Animated Short 9

imagePrompts.prompt:
Storyboard sheet, 15s comedic animated short, 9 panels (3x3).

Title: “ALIEN FIRST CONTACT”
Subtitle: “15s Comedic Storyboard – 9 Shots”

Style: black-and-white sketch storyboard, 2D cartoon animation style, clean hand-drawn linework, expressive caricatured characters, red panel borders, blue camera/action arrows.

Characters: small cute grey alien, big black eyes, sci-fi suit, mini ray pistol, nervous. Small Staffordshire dog, compact, robust, playful, affectionate, long tongue.

Important: keep clear left-right continuity. The dog always approaches from screen left toward screen right, directly toward the alien. In panel 05, the alien must aim the pistol directly at the incoming dog, never away.

Each panel: timecode, shot type, camera movement, short action note.

01 0–1.5s Wide/static: UFO lands in park at dusk.
02 1.5–3s Med/push-in: alien exits cautiously with pistol.
03 3–4.5s MCU/pan: alien senses movement, nervous.
04 4.5–6s Wide/tracking: dog runs from screen left toward alien fast.
05 6–7.5s Med/push-in: alien panics, aims pistol directly at dog.
06 7.5–9s Close/forward: dog jumps happily onto alien.
07 9–11s Close/tight: dog licks alien’s face.
08 11–13s Med/static: dog circles alien playfully.
09 13–15s Wide/final hold: alien lowers pistol, offers hand, dog gives paw.

Right side: character sheet + palette: purple-blue dusk sky, orange horizon, cyan glow, green park, grey alien, dark dog.
